title: Payment debited twice for annual subscription
body: Customer says their card was charged twice and wants a refund invoice correction before finance close.

title: Checkout outage impacting multiple merchants
body: Several merchants report checkout down after the latest release. Orders are failing with payment timeout errors.

title: OTP login not working on Android
body: User cannot login because OTP screen crashes repeatedly after entering mobile number.

title: Late delivery for premium customer
body: Shipment has been delayed for 3 days and customer is requesting escalation with latest ETA.

title: Feature request for bulk export
body: Customer success team requested CSV export for filtered ticket analytics and recurring reports.

title: Positive feedback for support agent
body: Customer thanked support team for resolving onboarding issue quickly.

title: GST invoice mismatch
body: Finance team reports GST number is incorrect on invoice and customer needs corrected document today.

title: API integration failure after token rotation
body: Partner integration started failing after token rotation. Error logs show unauthorized responses from webhook calls.

title: Refund pending for failed UPI payment
body: Customer paid through UPI, order failed, and refund has not reflected after five business days.

title: Webhook delivery timeout for CRM sync
body: CRM webhook calls are timing out and sales updates are not reaching the downstream dashboard.

title: Password reset link expired immediately
body: User receives password reset email but the link shows expired within seconds and blocks account access.

title: Mobile app crashes on order history page
body: Android app crashes when the customer opens order history after updating to the latest version.

title: Invoice PDF download returns 500
body: Finance users cannot download invoice PDFs because the endpoint returns internal server error.

title: Customer asks to cancel duplicate order
body: Two orders were created for the same cart and customer wants the duplicate cancelled before dispatch.

title: Data export missing March transactions
body: Analytics export excludes several March transactions and operations needs corrected report for reconciliation.

title: Urgent security concern for unknown login
body: Customer reports suspicious login from a new city and wants sessions revoked immediately.

title: Admin dashboard charts not loading
body: Internal dashboard shows blank charts after the morning deployment and team cannot view SLA metrics.

title: Coupon code applied but discount missing
body: Customer applied a campaign coupon but checkout charged full amount without discount.

title: SLA breach for enterprise support ticket
body: Enterprise account has waited 18 hours without response and account manager is asking for escalation.

title: Address update not saved before shipping
body: Customer updated delivery address but shipment still used the old address and may be misdelivered.

title: Payment gateway latency spike
body: Monitoring shows payment gateway latency above 8 seconds and checkout conversions are dropping.

title: Subscription renewal charged after cancellation
body: Customer cancelled subscription last week but was still charged during renewal cycle.

title: Bulk upload fails on large CSV
body: Operations team tried uploading a 15 MB CSV and ingestion failed without showing a clear error.

title: Account locked after too many OTP attempts
body: Customer is locked out after repeated OTP failures and needs access restored for urgent purchase.

title: Partner API rate limit exceeded
body: Integration partner is receiving rate limit errors after campaign traffic increased this morning.

title: Refund approved but not processed
body: Support approved refund in dashboard but payment provider still shows no refund transaction created.

title: Order tracking page shows wrong courier
body: Customer sees courier A on tracking page while warehouse system says courier B assigned.

title: Search results returning irrelevant items
body: Users searching for laptop accessories are seeing grocery products at the top of results.

title: Customer requests GST split invoice
body: Enterprise buyer wants separate GST invoices for two branches under the same purchase order.

title: High priority merchant onboarding blocked
body: Merchant cannot complete KYC verification because document upload is stuck at processing.

title: Delivery marked complete but package missing
body: Customer says delivery is marked complete but they did not receive the package or OTP call.

title: Email notifications delayed
body: Password and order confirmation emails are delayed by more than 20 minutes across multiple customers.

title: Admin cannot change user role
body: Workspace admin gets permission denied while trying to assign manager role to a new teammate.

title: Checkout page stuck after applying wallet
body: Customer wallet balance is deducted but checkout page stays on loading and order is not confirmed.

title: Duplicate support tickets created
body: Zendesk sync created duplicate tickets for the same email thread and confused assignment queue.

title: Negative review after delayed refund
body: Customer left negative review because refund timeline exceeded promised SLA by two days.

title: API returns stale inventory count
body: Storefront is showing items in stock although warehouse inventory service says zero quantity.

title: Login works on web but fails on iOS
body: iOS users report login failure after entering valid credentials while web login works normally.

title: Incorrect tax calculation on cart
body: Cart tax is calculated using old state code after customer changes shipping address.

title: Customer requests account deletion
body: User wants account and personal data deleted and asks for confirmation under privacy policy.

title: Critical outage in seller payout dashboard
body: Sellers cannot view payout status and multiple merchants are escalating on Slack.

title: Failed invoice email resend
body: Support agent tried resending invoice email but the message bounced with provider error.

title: Product image upload compresses badly
body: Merchant uploaded high quality images but product page displays blurry compressed versions.

title: Customer cannot update saved card
body: Saved card update fails with payment method validation error even though bank authorization succeeds.

title: Warehouse scan events not syncing
body: Barcode scan events from warehouse devices are not appearing in the order timeline.

title: Premium user cannot access paid feature
body: Subscription is active but feature access check says plan does not include premium analytics.

title: Refund amount lower than expected
body: Customer received partial refund but original invoice shows full refundable amount according to policy.

title: Slow dashboard after applying date filter
body: Operations dashboard takes more than 30 seconds when filtering last quarter data.

title: Two factor authentication setup fails
body: User scans QR code but authenticator app codes are rejected as invalid during setup.

title: Checkout button disabled for COD orders
body: Cash-on-delivery eligible customers see disabled checkout button on mobile web.

title: Customer asks for escalation call
body: High value customer wants manager call because issue remains unresolved after three support replies.

title: New release broke coupon validation
body: After release 2.8.1 coupon validation fails for all app-only campaign codes.

title: Wrong language in notification template
body: Tamil users are receiving Hindi notification copy after template migration.

title: Merchant settlement report mismatch
body: Settlement report total differs from bank credit amount by 17800 rupees.

title: Product variant selection resets cart
body: Selecting size variant resets cart quantity and removes previously selected add-ons.

title: Urgent compliance request for audit logs
body: Compliance team needs audit logs for admin actions before external audit tomorrow.

title: User profile photo upload stuck
body: Profile photo upload remains at 99 percent and never completes on Chrome browser.

title: Customer charged international fee
body: Customer says domestic card transaction was routed internationally and bank charged extra fee.

title: Shipment ETA missing for express order
body: Express order page does not show promised delivery date and customer wants assurance.

title: Webhook signature verification failing
body: Partner webhooks fail signature validation after secret rotation and events are being dropped.

title: Failed login due to captcha loop
body: User keeps solving captcha but login screen reloads and asks again repeatedly.

title: Bulk refund tool times out
body: Finance team selected 120 refunds and the bulk refund operation timed out halfway.

title: Customer wants address proof invoice
body: Customer requests invoice with complete billing address for employer reimbursement claim.

title: Product recommendation widget blank
body: Homepage recommendation widget is blank for logged-in users after personalization rollout.

title: Internal notes visible to customer
body: Support agent reports internal note content appeared in customer email thread unexpectedly.

title: Failed bank mandate registration
body: Auto-debit mandate registration fails after OTP verification with generic provider error.

title: Delayed pickup for return request
body: Return pickup was scheduled but courier has not contacted customer for four days.

title: API docs missing pagination details
body: Developer partner cannot integrate listing endpoint because pagination parameters are undocumented.

title: High CPU alerts after cron deployment
body: Backend CPU usage spiked after nightly cron job changes and requests are getting slower.

title: Customer cannot download warranty card
body: Warranty card download link opens blank page for electronics category purchases.

title: KYC document rejected incorrectly
body: Merchant says valid GST certificate was rejected by automated KYC validation.

title: Search API returns 429 for normal traffic
body: Search endpoint is rate limiting standard mobile app traffic after config change.

title: Refund notification sent twice
body: Customer received two refund confirmation messages with different timestamps for same order.

title: Manager approval workflow stuck
body: Expense approval workflow is stuck after manager approved the request but finance status did not update.

title: Unexpected logout during payment
body: Customer is logged out when redirected back from payment gateway and order state is lost.

title: Seller cannot upload catalog
body: Catalog upload fails for sellers when file contains more than 500 SKUs.

title: Compliance alert for PII in logs
body: Security scan found phone numbers and email addresses in application logs.

title: Analytics event duplication
body: Checkout_started event is firing twice and conversion dashboard is overcounting funnel entries.

title: Return refund split across wallet and card
body: Customer asks why return refund was split between wallet and card instead of original method.

title: Chat support widget offline
body: Website chat widget shows offline even though support agents are available in the console.

title: Customer cannot change phone number
body: Phone number update requires OTP to old number that customer no longer has access to.

title: Database migration caused missing orders
body: After migration, support cannot find several orders created between 1 AM and 2 AM.

title: Unclear cancellation policy question
body: Customer asks whether cancellation fee applies because order is packed but not shipped.

title: Wallet cashback not credited
body: Promotional cashback was promised after payment but wallet balance did not update.

title: API key exposed in partner screenshot
body: Partner accidentally shared screenshot containing API key and needs immediate rotation guidance.

title: Customer reports rude delivery behavior
body: Customer complained about delivery agent behavior and requested escalation to logistics manager.

title: Low stock alert not triggered
body: Low stock alert did not trigger for fast-moving SKU and storefront oversold inventory.

title: Billing page shows old company name
body: Company changed legal name but billing page and invoices still show old entity name.

title: New user onboarding email missing
body: New users created after noon did not receive onboarding email or activation instructions.

title: Repeated payment failure for same BIN
body: Cards from one bank BIN are failing with issuer unavailable while other cards work.

title: Customer asks for tax exemption support
body: Nonprofit customer wants tax exemption applied to annual invoice before payment.

title: Warehouse priority queue not respecting SLA
body: Premium orders are not moving ahead in warehouse queue despite SLA priority flag.

title: User cannot accept updated terms
body: Terms acceptance modal keeps reappearing even after user clicks accept.

title: Live tracking map shows wrong location
body: Tracking map pins delivery agent 20 km away from actual route and customers are calling support.

title: Failed payout due to invalid IFSC
body: Seller payout failed because IFSC validation accepted outdated branch code during onboarding.

title: Customer requests invoice correction before month end
body: Customer needs billing name corrected today so finance can close monthly accounts.

title: Cart abandoned due to slow payment page
body: Session recordings show customers dropping at payment page because loading spinner stays too long.

title: Suspicious refund pattern detected
body: Risk team found repeated refund requests from same device across multiple accounts.

title: Support macro inserted wrong refund amount
body: Agent macro inserted outdated refund amount in email reply and customer is confused.

title: Merchant app push notifications failing
body: Merchant app is not receiving order alerts after push certificate renewal.
